positive: A central composition featuring a group of stylized, diverse animals (a wise owl, a majestic fox, a friendly polar bear, and an arctic wolf) gathered around a glowing, stylized moon crescent. The animals are depicted with clean, thick outlines, modern flat illustration style mixed with neo-folk art elements. Use high contrast color blocking with deep midnight blues, forest greens, warm amber yellows, and crisp white highlights. The composition should be perfectly centered, suitable for a t-shirt print. The background should be a minimal, abstract starry night sky gradient. Cinematic lighting, graphic novel quality, perfect symmetry, vector art style, highly detailed illustration.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logos, trademarks, blurry background, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, gradient fade, photorealism, graffiti
